nasb.text: Behold, I am going to bring terror upon you,” Declares the Lord God of hosts, “From all directions around you; And each of you will be driven out headlong, With no one to gather the fugitives together.

esv.text: Behold, I will bring terror upon you, declares the Lord God of hosts, from all who are around you, and you shall be driven out, every man straight before him, with none to gather the fugitives.

cnv.text: 看哪！我必使你們因四圍的列國而恐慌， 這是主萬軍之耶和華的宣告； 你們必被趕逐，各自逃命， 沒有人把四散奔逃的人聚集起來。

ccb.text: 上帝——万军之耶和华说： “看啊，我要使你们四面受敌， 惊恐万状，四散奔逃， 溃不成军。
